workplan: Verify ADK imports, install litellm for OpenRouter/LiteLLM backend, confirm correct ADK Runner+Session pattern, test end-to-end with openai/gpt-4o-mini via OpenRouter
tasks_completed: Verified google.adk is installed in system Python
Discovered LiteLLM is required for openai/* model patterns via google-adk[extensions]
Determined correct ADK API: Agent(instruction=...) not instructions=...
Determined correct invocation: Runner + InMemorySessionService + run_async()
Confirmed OPENAI_API_KEY + OPENAI_API_BASE env var pattern for OpenRouter routing
Test agent responded successfully: 'Hello! I'm an AI assistant, also known as test_agent.'
decisions_made: Use LiteLLM as OpenRouter bridge (openai/* prefix maps to LiteLLM provider)
Use ADK Runner+InMemorySessionService pattern (not direct agent() calls)
Wrap async run_agent() with asyncio.run() for sync usage in agents
tools_called: python -c on LiteLLM import error to find correct extension
errors_encountered: instructions= param rejected (correct param is instruction=)
Agent() object not callable directly (must use Runner)
LiteLLM not installed initially: pip install litellm resolved it
outcome: ADK + OpenRouter + LiteLLM stack confirmed working. Base runner_utils.py created as shared foundation for all 8 agents.
